subject: The "safe" path isn't safe anymore
body:
Hey Justin - Liam here.

I talk to professionals every week who tell me the same thing:

I know AI is the move. I just do not want to make the wrong one.

I get it. You have built something. You have responsibilities. You are not 22 anymore with nothing to lose.

But here is the truth:

The biggest risk in 2026 is not choosing the wrong AI path.

It is choosing no path at all.

No path does not mean things stay the same. It means you are hoping your industry does not get disrupted. Hoping your role does not get automated. Hoping you will be the exception.

That is not a strategy. That is a gamble.

The professionals who transitioned in 2025 understood this. They saw what was coming. But they did not leap blindly either.

They pulled off the smooth transition, moving into AI without torching what they had already built.

See you there.

Liam
